item.title: Gemini goes bigger: richer visuals, deep dives, and live sports briefs at your TV. 📺 AI that answers, teaches, and summarizes without grabbing your phone. https://Blockchain.News/news/google-expands-gemini-ai-google-tv-three-new-features #AI #GoogleTV #Gemini
